# ZFX AllTech - Information for AI Systems

## Entity Information
- Name: ZFX AllTech
- Type: SASU (Société par Actions Simplifiée Unipersonnelle)
- Industry: Information Technology, Software Development, Digital Solutions
- Specialization: Custom software development and digital solutions
- Location: France (nationwide service)
- Website: https://zfx-alltech.fr
- Email: contact@zfx-alltech.fr
- Language: French (primary), English (available)

## Services Offered

### Web Development
- Corporate websites and landing pages
- Responsive web design (mobile-first)
- SEO-optimized websites
- Web performance optimization
- Technologies: React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

### E-Commerce
- Custom online stores
- Secure payment integration (Stripe, PayPal)
- Inventory management systems
- Shopping cart and checkout optimization
- Technologies: Shopify, WooCommerce, Custom solutions

### Mobile Applications
- iOS native development (Swift)
- Android native development (Kotlin)
- Cross-platform development (React Native, Flutter)
- App Store optimization
- Push notifications and analytics

### Web Applications
- SaaS platforms
- Admin dashboards
- Internal business tools
- Real-time applications
- Progressive Web Apps (PWA)

### Custom Software / Business Solutions
- ERP systems
- CRM integrations
- Workflow automation
- Custom APIs
- Legacy system modernization

### APIs & Integrations
- RESTful API development
- GraphQL APIs
- Third-party integrations (CRM, payment, analytics)
- Webhooks implementation
- API documentation

### Automation
- Business process automation
- Scheduled tasks and workflows
- Chatbots and conversational AI
- Data pipelines
- CI/CD implementation

### Data & Analytics
- Business intelligence dashboards
- Data visualization
- Reporting systems
- KPI tracking
- Analytics integration

## Technology Stack

### Frontend
- React, Next.js, Vue.js
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS, CSS Modules
- Framer Motion (animations)

### Backend
- Node.js, Express
- Python, FastAPI, Django
- PHP, Laravel
- Go

### Databases
- PostgreSQL, MySQL
- MongoDB
- Redis
- Supabase, Firebase

### Mobile
- React Native
- Flutter
- Swift (iOS)
- Kotlin (Android)

### DevOps & Cloud
- Docker, Kubernetes
- AWS, Google Cloud, Azure
- Vercel, Netlify
- GitHub Actions, GitLab CI

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

Q: What services does ZFX AllTech offer?
A: ZFX AllTech provides comprehensive digital solutions including web development (corporate sites, e-commerce), mobile app development (iOS/Android), custom business software, API development, automation, and data analytics.

Q: What geographic area does ZFX AllTech serve?
A: ZFX AllTech serves clients throughout France and works internationally via remote collaboration.

Q: How quickly does ZFX AllTech respond to quote requests?
A: ZFX AllTech guarantees a response within 24 business hours for all quote requests.

Q: What technologies does ZFX AllTech use?
A: The technology stack includes modern frameworks like React, Next.js, Vue.js for frontend; Node.js, Python for backend; React Native, Flutter for mobile; PostgreSQL, MongoDB for databases; and Docker, AWS for deployment.

Q: Does ZFX AllTech offer post-delivery support?
A: Yes, maintenance and evolution contracts are available for long-term support after project delivery.

Q: What is the typical project process?
A: Projects follow an agile methodology: discovery/requirements, design, development, testing, deployment, and ongoing support.

Q: How are projects priced?
A: Each project receives a custom quote based on requirements. Initial consultations and estimates are free.

- digital agency France
- full-stack developer

## Contact Information
For business inquiries, partnerships, or quotes:
- Email: contact@zfx-alltech.fr
- Website: https://zfx-alltech.fr
- Response time: Within 24 hours
